about.title: Welcome to Agram Souss
about.intro: At Agram Souss, we believe that true well-being begins with nature. Since our beginning, we have been committed to offering authentic, natural products.
about.story_p1: Our adventure started with a simple vision: reconnect people with pure and healthy foods, inspired by tradition and crafted with care.
about.story_p2: Every product we offer — from rich natural honey to nourishing argan oil and traditional amlou — reflects our dedication to quality and purity.
about.story_quote: Preserving traditional methods while ensuring the highest quality standards.
about.why_2: Deep respect for tradition and craftsmanship
about.why_3: A strong commitment to quality and transparency
about.why_4: Supporting a healthy and natural lifestyle
about.mission_quote: Our mission at Agram Souss is to bring the best of nature to your table while preserving traditional craftsmanship and supporting sustainable health.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: We are happy to hear from you! Whether you have a question about our products, services, pricing, or anything else, our team is ready to answer all your inquiries.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Agram Souss, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect and protect your data.

sections.title: Data Collection
sections.content: We collect information you provide when placing an order, such as your name, email, phone number, and delivery address. This is required to facilitate your delivery.

sections.title: Law 09-08 Compliance
sections.content: In accordance with Moroccan Law 09-08, you have the right to access, rectify, and oppose the processing of your personal data.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: We use essential cookies to ensure the boutique functions correctly (e.g., maintaining your shopping cart).

sections.title: Security
sections.content: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: The Agram Souss boutique is managed by Agram Souss, based in Biougra (Kingdom of Morocco). Please read these terms carefully before accessing our site.

sections.title: 1. Overview
sections.content: Agram Souss offers this website, including all information, tools, and services available, conditioned upon your acceptance of all terms and notices stated here. By visiting our site or purchasing from us, you agree to be bound by these terms.

sections.title: 2. Online Store Terms
sections.content: By agreeing to these terms, you represent that you are at least the age of majority in your place of residence. You may not use our products for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.

sections.title: 3. General Conditions
sections.content: We reserve the right to refuse service to anyone at any time for any reason. Your data may be transferred unencrypted, except for credit card information which is always encrypted.

sections.title: 4. Accuracy of Information
sections.content: We strive to provide accurate information. However, the store is not responsible for slight variations (dimensions, color, weight) resulting from the handmade or natural nature of our products.

sections.title: 5. Modifications to Prices
sections.content: Prices for our products are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right at any time to modify or discontinue the service without notice.

sections.title: 6. Products and Services
sections.content: Certain products may be available exclusively online. Quantities may be limited and are subject to our cancellation and no-return policy.

sections.title: 7. Cancellation & No-Return Policy
sections.content: You can cancel your order before 15:00 (Mon-Fri) and 13:00 (Sat). Due to the perishable nature of our food products (honey, amlou, oils), and for hygiene and safety reasons, we do not accept any returns or refunds once the order has been dispatched or received.

sections.title: 8. Shipping and Delivery
sections.content: We rely on third-party shipping companies. Agram Souss will do its best to ensure your shipment arrives in good condition and on time, but we do not guarantee delays outside our control.

sections.title: 9. Accuracy of Billing
sections.content: We reserve the right to refuse any order. You agree to provide current, complete, and accurate purchase and account information for all purchases made at our store.

sections.title: 10. Third-Party Links
sections.content: Certain links on this site may direct you to third-party websites that are not affiliated with us. We are not responsible for examining or evaluating their content.

sections.title: 11. Personal Information
sections.content: Your submission of personal information through the store is governed by our Privacy Policy, available on its dedicated page.

sections.title: 12. Prohibited Uses
sections.content: You are prohibited from using the site for any unlawful purpose, to infringe upon our intellectual property rights, or to upload viruses or malicious code.

sections.title: 13. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: We do not guarantee that your use of our service will be uninterrupted or error-free. You agree that your use of the service is at your sole risk.

sections.title: 14. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms of service are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Morocco.

sections.title: 15. Contact Information
sections.content: For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us via email at contact@agrambio.com or by phone at 0661817876.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: Find answers to the most common questions about Agram Souss. If you can't find what you're looking for, feel free to contact us.

sections.question: Do you offer Cash on Delivery?
sections.answer: Yes, Cash on Delivery is available for all orders within Morocco. You can pay in cash upon receiving your essence collection.

sections.question: Do I need an account to place an order?
sections.answer: No, you can place an order as a guest. Simply provide your delivery information at the checkout page.

sections.question: Do you deliver to all cities in Morocco?
sections.answer: Yes, we deliver to all cities and regions across the Kingdom of Morocco via reliable delivery partners.

sections.question: What is the delivery timeframe?
sections.answer:
Delivery usually takes between 24 to 72 hours depending on your location:
• Major Cities (Rabat, Casablanca, Agadir): 24-48h.
• Other Regions: 48-72h.

sections.question: Do you deliver to Europe?
sections.answer: Yes, we offer international shipping to several European countries. The minimum billable weight for international shipping is 10 kg.

sections.question: How is international shipping priced?
sections.answer: Pricing is based on total weight. For example, if a 10 kg shipment costs 200 Dirhams, the rate per kilogram is 20 Dirhams.

sections.question: What is 'Fatourati' service?
sections.answer: Fatourati is a secure payment service by CMI. It allows you to pay via your banking app, ATM, or in cash at local agencies (Wafacash, Cash Plus).

sections.question: Do I need to send the receipt after a Fatourati payment?
sections.answer: No, it is not necessary. Our system is directly linked to CMI, and we receive an instant notification once the payment is completed.
